arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United score predicted with huge Premier League drama
arts.sum: Manchester United face Arsenal in the Premier League later today, so we simulated the clash to predict what could happen.

arts.ttl: 10 players could miss Arsenal vs Man Utd as new injury revealed in emotional statement
arts.sum: Another problem then came to light for Arsenal with Gabriel Magalhaes, after scoring and winning a penalty, going off at half time with Arteta revealing it was related to the issue he felt against Sporting CP earlier that week. The Gunners have been plagued by injuries this season and though Mikel Arteta's side finally looked to be over that crisis, three fresh issues have since emerged.

arts.ttl: We simulated Arsenal vs Man United to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: A thrilling first half saw Arsenal score five goals in a 5-2 win over West Ham United, with the Gunners ending the week second in the Premier League table, joint on points with third-placed Chelsea. Arsenal have the chance to make it three Premier League wins in a row later today when they take on rivals Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool monitoring Brazilian winger ahead of potential transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are both understood to be monitoring LA Galaxy’s highly-rated Brazilian winger Gabriel Pec, sources have told CaughtOffside. The Gunners and the Reds are among a number of Premier League clubs who’ve had scouts keeping an eye on Pec, who is showing himself to be an exciting young talent. Arsenal move AHEAD of […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool monitoring Brazilian winger ahead of potential transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal fan group issue Rainbow Laces plea to fellow supporters ahead of crunch Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will host Manchester United on Wednesday in their dedicated Rainbow Laces fixture, with the Gay Gooners group urging fans to back the LGBT+ inclusion campaign

arts.ttl: Manchester United Shelved Rumored Pursuit of Osimhen
arts.sum: Napoli will most likely have to wait until next summer to sort out the future of Victor Osimhen for good. At this stage, there’s no traction about a January sale. Moreover, Galatasaray surely won’t activate his €75M release clause. The post Manchester United Shelved Rumored Pursuit of Osimhen appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Manchester United: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal needs to continue its run of success against Manchester United to kick off a busy December.

arts.ttl: Manchester United Predicted Lineup vs. Arsenal: Premier League
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without both Lisandro Martinez and Kobbie Mainoo against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Evan Ferguson to Arsenal? The state of play revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with a potential move for Brighton striker Evan Ferguson as the January transfer window approaches, with the Gunners having searched for a centre-forward since the summer. Brighton are thought to be ready to allow Republic of Ireland international Ferguson to depart on a loan deal in January, with the 20-year-old forward having struggled to gain the favour of head coach Fabian Hurzeler following injury issues.

arts.ttl: PL Predictions: Another Man City defeat, Man Utd to be thrashed
arts.sum: Our football betting expert Jones Knows is back to provide more Premier League insight ahead of a busy midweek card.
